summary.label: Terrain Stability - Class 5
summary.notes: Accepted strict public TSM Class V proxy for MP11 Step 210 using `data/source/tfl_6/terrain/tsm_detailed_polygons_tfl6.gpkg`, filtered to `slope_stability_class_w_roads == 'V'`. This applies the newly identified public terrain-stability source instead of skipping the row. The resulting deduction is much smaller than MP11, so the residual remains an explicit public-source coverage/semantic gap rather than a WFP DTSM equivalence claim.

layers.active_fragments: retained resultant fragments after this step
